query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS menu_sections (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  owner_id INT NOT NULL,
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  sort_order INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  has_sales_tax BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
  has_admin_fee BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
  has_gratuity BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
  apply_to_min BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
  sales_category VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT 'Food',
  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS standalone_menu_items (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  owner_id INT NOT NULL,
  section_id INT NOT NULL,
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  price_per_person VARCHAR(20),
  price_flat VARCHAR(20),
  pricing_type VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'per_person',
  image_url TEXT,
  has_sales_tax BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
  has_admin_fee BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
  has_gratuity BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
  apply_to_min BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
  sort_order INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS sales_categories (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  owner_id INT NOT NULL,
  name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  sort_order INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS quickstart_progress (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  owner_id INT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  venue_details BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
  contact_form BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
  bank_account BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
  menu BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
  spaces BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
  taxes_fees BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
  updated_at BIGINT NOT NULL
);
